_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored). Lists which Takeout albums represent PEOPLE, so their photos get a `pictured` entity hint. This is an explicit allow-list on purpose: an album not listed here (a trip, an event) ingests as a photo with NO person hint. The key is the album title as it appears in Google Photos (from the album's metadata.json, falling back to the folder name). Value overrides: `alias` when the album is titled differently from the contact (album 'Mom' -> contact 'Jane Doe'); `confidence` (0-0.9 for names; core clamps), `role`, `alias_type` are optional.
_person_album_patterns_comment: Optional regex fallback over album titles. `alias_from_capture` picks a capture group as the person's name; omit it to use the whole title. Prefer the explicit map above — patterns risk false matches.
